<Badge text="tanstack-router-best-practices" variant="note" /> <Badge text="23 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> TanStack Query, Start, and Router best practices. Complements curated React/Next skills without overlapping `vercel-react-best-practices`.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add deckardger/tanstack-agent-skills --skill tanstack-query-best-practices --skill tanstack-start-best-practices --skill tanstack-router-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/tanstack-router-best-practices`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/tanstack-router-best-practices.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add deckardger/tanstack-agent-skills --skill tanstack-query-best-practices --skill tanstack-start-best-practices --skill tanstack-router-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: TanStack Query, Start, and Router best practices. Complements curated React/Next skills without overlapping `vercel-react-best-practices`.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

TanStack Router best practices for type-safe routing, data loading, search params, navigation, and code splitting in React apps. 30+ rules covering type safety, route organization, loaders, search param validation, preloading. Integrates with TanStack Query for data.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add DeckardGer/tanstack-agent-skills --skill tanstack-query-best-practices --skill tanstack-router-best-practices --skill tanstack-start-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`; status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[DeckardGer/tanstack-agent-skills](https://github.com/DeckardGer/tanstack-agent-skills) (community contributor)

## Comparable Alternatives

TanStack Start skills or file-based router skills from other frameworks; general routing best practices skills.
